title: NeuronForge Lane Analytics Record
description: Machine-readable lane visibility surface for ForgeCommand consumption. One record per lane.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this schema file.

schema_version.description: Version of the lane analytics schema this record conforms to.

lane_id.description: Stable machine identifier. Must match filename stem.

lane_type.description: Lane functional classification. Not a closed enum in v1.

status.description: Current governed status of the lane.

required_route_class.description: Minimum route class required for this lane. Not a closed enum in v1.

adoption_posture.description: Current adoption posture governing how lane output may be used.

current_baseline_model.description: Active baseline model identifier, or null if no baseline is established.

current_baseline_prompt_profile.description: Active prompt profile identifier, or null if no baseline is established.

anchor_input.description: Repo-relative path to the canonical anchor input used for baseline validation, or null.

anchor_run_id.description: Run ID of the anchor evaluation run, or null.

last_evaluated_date.description: ISO 8601 date of the most recent governed evaluation. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

current_judgment.description: Concise human-readable judgment on the current lane state. Dashboard-ready.

calibration_doc.description: Repo-relative path to the calibration document for this lane, or null.

status_doc.description: Repo-relative path to the lane status document, or null.

metrics.description: Numeric performance metrics from the most recent governed evaluation. Values must be numbers, not percent strings.

schema_reliability.description: Fraction of runs that produced valid schema-conformant envelopes.

false_positive_rate.description: Fraction of restraint cases incorrectly flagged.

surface_detection_rate.description: Fraction of surface true-positive cases correctly detected.

next_required_decision.description: Concise statement of the next governance decision required for this lane.

metric_provenance.description: Evidence class of the metric values in this record. Determines how downstream consumers may interpret and compare metrics.

metrics_gate_eligible.description: Whether the metric set is strong enough evidence to participate in automated or semi-automated trust posture actions such as auto-promote suggestions or lane health gating.

provenance_notes.description: Human-readable explanation of metric derivation details. Required (non-null) when metric_provenance is operator_judged or mixed.

metric_profile.description: Interpretation contract for this lane's metric set. Tells downstream consumers which metric family is primary and how to interpret the shared metric trio. This is not provenance — it declares lane type, not evidence strength.
